name: Welcome Email
subject: Welcome to {{company}}, {{name}}!
body:
Dear {{name}},

Welcome to {{company}}! We're thrilled to have you join us as a {{role}}.

Your registered email is {{email}}.

Here's what you can expect in your first week:
- A welcome kit delivered to your desk
- Onboarding sessions with your team lead
- Access to all company resources

If you have any questions, don't hesitate to reach out.

Best regards,
{{company}} HR Team

name: Newsletter
subject: {{company}} Monthly Update - Hello {{name}}!
body:
Hi {{name}},

Here's your monthly update from {{company}}:

📊 Key Highlights:
- Revenue grew 15% this quarter
- We launched 3 new features
- Team expanded to 50+ members

🎯 Upcoming Events:
- Annual company retreat (June 15-17)
- Product launch webinar (May 3)

💡 Tips & Resources:
- Check out our new knowledge base
- Join our Slack community for quick support

Stay connected,
The {{company}} Team

name: Meeting Invitation (HTML)
subject: Meeting Invite: Discussion with {{name}}
body:
Meeting Invitation

Dear {{name}},

You are invited to a meeting to discuss upcoming projects at {{company}}.

DateApril 25, 2026
Time2:00 PM - 3:00 PM
LocationConference Room A / Virtual
Attendee{{name}} ({{role}})

Please confirm your attendance by replying to this email at {{email}}.

Regards,
{{company}} Admin
